apps.title: Apps
apps.description: Manage API keys, scopes, and webhook integrations for external services.
apps.noAppsDesc: Create an API key to integrate external services with your organization.
apps.name: App Name
apps.scopesDesc: Select the permissions this app should have.
apps.allowedMethodsDesc: Restrict which HTTP methods this key can use. Leave empty for all.
apps.allowedModulesDesc: Restrict which modules this key can access. Leave empty for all scoped modules.
apps.ipWhitelistDesc: Restrict access to specific IPs, CIDR ranges, or domains. Leave empty for unrestricted.
apps.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this app? This cannot be undone.
apps.regenerateSecretConfirm: This will invalidate the current API key. The new key will only be shown once.
apps.secretWarning: Copy these credentials now — they won't be shown again.
apps.secretBannerTitle: Save your API secret — it won't be shown again
apps.noDataYet: No data yet — make some API calls to see traffic trends.
apps.hourlyRequestsDesc: Requests per hour over the last 7 days
apps.authDesc: How to authenticate your API requests
apps.noLogsYet: No requests logged yet — make your first API call to see logs here.
apps.noErrors: No errors recorded — your API is running clean!
apps.newApiSecretDesc: Copy your new API secret now. You won't be able to see it again.
apps.editAppDesc: Update app name, description, permissions and IP restrictions.
apps.ipWhitelistEditDesc: Comma-separated IP addresses or CIDR ranges. Leave empty to allow all.
apps.revokeConfirmFull: This will permanently revoke access for {name}. All API requests using this app's credentials will be rejected.
apps.regenerateSecretFullDesc: This will invalidate the current API secret. Any applications using the old secret will stop working immediately. This action cannot be undone.
